scoreCards.riskCaption: Residual risk index · lower is better

executiveSummary.title: Executive Summary
executiveSummary.headline: Compliance posture is strengthening across all regulated entities, with residual risk trending down quarter-over-quarter.
executiveSummary.body: Coverage against NCA ECC and ISO 27001 now exceeds 84%, and the PDPL readiness program is on track for its Q3 attestation. AI-assisted review cleared 412 artifacts this period, surfacing 7 high-priority findings now in remediation. No control sign-offs were auto-applied — every consequential change passed a human approval gate.
executiveSummary.footer: Grounded in 1,248 controls and 412 reviewed artifacts · every consequential change passed a human approval gate.

hero.title: Compliance work your auditors will trust
hero.description: Sentinel GRC helps Governance, Risk, Compliance, Privacy, and Legal teams author, map, and monitor controls across every framework you answer to — grounded in your own evidence, reviewed by your people.

trustedBy.label: Built for regulated industries across Saudi Arabia and the Gulf

why.title: Manual compliance work doesn't scale — and it doesn't hold up under audit
why.description: Spreadsheets and disconnected evidence make every audit a scramble. Sentinel GRC grounds every answer in your own documents and keeps a human decision behind every consequential change — so your posture is always current, and always defensible.

controlMapping.title: Control mapping across frameworks
controlMapping.description: Map evidence and controls once, and see coverage across every framework you're held to — no duplicate work per regulator.

groundedAnswers.title: Grounded, cited answers

governedMissions.title: Governed missions, not chat

howItWorks.title: From documents to audit-ready posture in four steps

step1.title: Bring your policies and evidence
step1.description: Upload what you already have — nothing needs reformatting first.

step2.title: The platform reads and grounds them
step2.description: Documents are parsed and indexed against the frameworks you select.

step3.title: Review coverage, gaps, and risk
step3.description: Every number traces back to a source document.

step4.title: Act, approve, and report
step4.description: Close gaps and generate an audit-ready report with a clear sign-off trail.

frameworks.title: Built for the frameworks you're already held to
frameworks.description: Regional and international standards, mapped once and kept current.

humanDecides.title: A human always decides
humanDecides.description: The platform proposes, drafts, and analyzes — a qualified person on your team approves anything consequential, like a control sign-off or a risk acceptance.

q1.question: Does Sentinel GRC replace our compliance team?
q1.answer: No. The platform is built as an assistant, not a replacement — it drafts, analyzes, and organizes work, but a qualified person on your team always reviews and approves anything consequential, like a policy publication or a risk acceptance.

q2.question: Where does the AI get its answers from?
q2.answer: Every answer is grounded in your own uploaded documents and the compliance framework text — never a general-purpose guess. If the platform doesn't have enough evidence to answer confidently, it tells you that instead of making something up.

q3.question: Is our data isolated from other organizations?
q3.answer: Yes. The platform is built multi-tenant from the ground up — every query, document, and AI retrieval is scoped strictly to your organization. Cross-tenant access isn't possible by design.

q4.question: How do we get started?
q4.answer: Sign in, upload a policy or piece of evidence, and select the frameworks you're measured against. Coverage, gaps, and grounded answers are available within minutes.

cta.title: See your compliance posture clearly
cta.description: Start with your existing policies and evidence — Sentinel GRC grounds every answer in what you already have.

sama.description: Saudi Central Bank cybersecurity and compliance requirements for the financial sector.

pdpl.description: Saudi Arabia's personal data protection and privacy regulation.

iso27001.name: ISO/IEC 27001:2022
iso27001.description: The international standard for information security management systems.

nistCsf.name: NIST Cybersecurity Framework
nistCsf.description: A risk-based framework for managing cybersecurity outcomes.

cisControls.name: CIS Critical Security Controls
cisControls.description: Prioritized safeguards to mitigate the most common cyber attacks.

cobit.name: COBIT
cobit.description: Governance and management framework for enterprise IT.

coso.name: COSO Internal Control Framework
coso.description: Internal control and enterprise risk management framework.

hero.title: From documents to audit-ready posture in four steps
hero.description: No new templates to learn — Sentinel GRC works with the policies and evidence your team already maintains.

step1.title: Bring your policies and evidence
step1.description: Upload the documents you already have — policies, prior audit reports, contracts, and evidence artifacts. Nothing needs to be reformatted first.

step2.title: The platform reads and grounds them
step2.description: Your documents are parsed and indexed against the frameworks you select, so answers and coverage numbers are grounded in what you actually have — not a generic template.

step3.title: Review coverage, gaps, and risk
step3.description: See exactly which controls are covered, which are gaps, and how your risk register looks — with every number traceable back to a source document.

step4.title: Act, approve, and report
step4.description: Draft policies, close gaps, and accept risk with a clear sign-off trail, then generate an audit-ready report whenever you need one.

cta.title: Bring your first document in under a minute
cta.description: Sign in and upload a policy to see grounded coverage against your chosen framework.

hero.title: Frequently asked questions
hero.description: If your question isn't answered here, reach out and we'll walk you through it directly.

q1.question: Does Sentinel GRC replace our compliance team?
q1.answer: No. The platform is built as an assistant, not a replacement — it drafts, analyzes, and organizes work, but a qualified person on your team always reviews and approves anything consequential, like a policy publication or a risk acceptance.

q2.question: Where does the AI get its answers from?
q2.answer: Every answer is grounded in your own uploaded documents and the compliance framework text — never a general-purpose guess. If the platform doesn't have enough evidence to answer confidently, it tells you that instead of making something up.

q3.question: Which frameworks are supported?
q3.answer: Both regional and international standards, including NCA ECC, SAMA, and PDPL for Saudi Arabia, and ISO 27001, NIST CSF, CIS Controls, COBIT, and COSO internationally. New frameworks are added as configuration, not custom development.

q4.question: Is our data isolated from other organizations?
q4.answer: Yes. The platform is built multi-tenant from the ground up — every query, document, and AI retrieval is scoped strictly to your organization. Cross-tenant access isn't possible by design.

q5.question: Can we see how an AI-generated answer was produced?
q5.answer: Yes. Every AI-driven answer or recommendation is traceable back to the source documents and framework references it used, along with who approved any resulting action and when — built for external audit review.

q6.question: How do we get started?
q6.answer: Sign in, upload a policy or piece of evidence, and select the frameworks you're measured against. Coverage, gaps, and grounded answers are available within minutes.

cta.title: Still have questions?
cta.description: Sign in to explore a demo workspace, or reach out to talk through your specific frameworks and requirements.

hero.title: Audit-ready reports, generated on demand
hero.description: The same executive, compliance, and risk reports your workspace produces live — shown here with sample data so you can see the output before you sign in.

executive.title: Executive Summary
executive.narrative: Sample data. Coverage improved across ISO 27001 and NCA ECC this quarter, driven by newly linked evidence for access-control and logging requirements. Twelve control gaps remain open, concentrated in vendor risk management.

compliance.title: Compliance Report
compliance.narrative: Sample data. Per-framework breakdown of covered vs. gap controls, with the evidence backing each covered control and a prioritized list of the highest-impact gaps to close next.

risk.title: Risk Report
risk.narrative: Sample data. Inherent and residual scoring for every tracked risk, mitigation status, and ownership — ready to hand to leadership or an external auditor as-is.

cta.title: Generate this against your own evidence
cta.description: Every report above is built live from your coverage, evidence, and risk data once you sign in.

hero.title: One platform for governance, risk, and compliance work
hero.description: Sentinel GRC connects your controls, policies, evidence, and risk register to the frameworks you're measured against — and keeps every step traceable.

missions.title: Work runs as governed missions
missions.description: Instead of open-ended chat, every piece of compliance work — a gap analysis, an evidence sweep, a questionnaire response — runs as a mission with a clear goal, a visible plan, and a full history of what happened and why. You can see exactly what a mission is doing at any point, and step in whenever you need to.

grounded.title: Every answer is grounded and cited
grounded.description: The platform never guesses on compliance matters. Answers are built from your own policies, evidence, and the framework text itself, and every claim carries a citation back to its source. If the evidence isn't there, the platform says so instead of filling the gap with a plausible-sounding answer.

human.title: A human approves anything consequential
human.description: Drafting a policy, proposing a control mapping, or flagging a risk is something the platform can do on its own. Publishing that policy, accepting that risk, or signing off a control always requires a qualified person on your team to review the evidence and approve it explicitly.

cta.title: Ready to see it against your own evidence?
cta.description: Sign in with a demo workspace to explore missions, coverage, and reporting first-hand.

hero.title: Everything your compliance team needs in one workspace
hero.description: Controls, policies, risk, evidence, and reporting — connected, not scattered across spreadsheets and email threads.

controls.title: Controls
controls.description: A live view of every control across your frameworks, its coverage status, and the evidence backing it.

policies.title: Policies
policies.description: Author and review policies with a clear draft → review → published workflow and control mapping.

frameworks.title: Frameworks
frameworks.description: Coverage and gaps tracked per framework, with cross-framework mapping so one piece of evidence can satisfy several regulators at once.

riskRegister.title: Risk register
riskRegister.description: Score risks with a standard likelihood × impact matrix, track mitigation, and require sign-off before any risk is accepted.

evidence.title: Evidence
evidence.description: Upload, tag, and version evidence, and link it directly to the controls and policies it supports.

aiWorkspace.title: AI workspace
aiWorkspace.description: Ask questions about your compliance posture in plain language and get grounded, cited answers.

assessments.title: Assessments
assessments.description: Run gap analyses and coverage assessments against any supported framework.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Generate executive, compliance, and risk reports on demand, ready to export for auditors and leadership.

cta.title: See it running against real evidence
cta.description: Every feature above is grounded in your own documents from the moment you sign in.

hero.title: Built for regional and international regulators alike
hero.description: Map one set of controls and evidence against every framework you're held to — Sentinel GRC's framework engine adds new standards without changing how you work.

frameworksSupportedPage.footerNote: Don't see a framework you need? The framework engine represents every standard as structured data, so new frameworks are added without any change to how your controls, evidence, or reports work.

cta.title: See your coverage across every framework at once
cta.description: Sign in to view live coverage percentages, gaps, and evidence for your own workspace.

policiesPage.title: Policies
policiesPage.description: Author policies, map them to controls, and move them through review to publication. Publishing is a human-gated action restricted to owners, admins, and compliance managers.
